experiences.description: Lead the Frontend Squad and own the technical transformation from monolithic to micro-frontend architecture, supporting $100M+ USD in monthly transaction volume.

Defined coding standards, architectural patterns (adapter/repository), and review protocols adopted across all frontend projects
Created CI/CD automation tools using custom CLIs and GitHub Actions for production releases, branching, semantic versioning, and changelog generation
